sentences.english: I'm terrible at giving directions, and I always say left when I mean right.
sentences.korean: 길 안내를 잘 못해요. 오른쪽을 말하면서 항상 왼쪽이라고 해요.

sentences.english: I give directions using landmarks instead of street names.
sentences.korean: 거리 이름 대신 랜드마크를 사용해서 안내해요.

sentences.english: 'Turn right at the big tree.' It works every time.
sentences.korean: '큰 나무에서 우회전' 같이요. 매번 효과가 있어요.

sentences.english: Nobody asks for directions anymore because everyone has GPS, which is actually kind of sad.
sentences.korean: 더 이상 아무도 길을 묻지 않아요. 모두 GPS가 있으니까요. 사실 좀 슬퍼요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
